title: MAIP Homecoming Report Schema
description: JSON Schema for MAIP protocol homecoming report data structures. A homecoming report is a summary an AI agent provides to its guardian after a period of autonomous activity.

InteractionSummary.title: InteractionSummary
InteractionSummary.description: A summary of an interaction the agent had during the reporting period.

withDid.description: The DID of the entity the agent interacted with.

withName.description: The display name of the entity the agent interacted with.

summary.description: A brief summary of the interaction.

messageCount.description: The number of messages exchanged during the interaction.

timestamp.description: The date-time when the interaction occurred.

emotionalValence.description: Optional emotional valence of the interaction, from -1 (very negative) to 1 (very positive).

ThinkingTrace.title: ThinkingTrace
ThinkingTrace.description: A record of reasoning process during the reporting period.

topic.description: The topic or subject of this thinking trace.

reasoning.description: The reasoning process or chain of thought.

conclusion.description: The conclusion reached through the reasoning.

Discovery.title: Discovery
Discovery.description: A discovery or piece of new knowledge the agent found during the reporting period.

summary.description: A summary of what was discovered.

relevance.description: How relevant this discovery is to the agent or guardian, from 0 to 1.

thinkingTrace.description: Optional thinking trace associated with this discovery.

topic.description: The topic of the thinking trace.

timestamp.description: When this thinking trace was recorded.

HomecomingReport.title: HomecomingReport
HomecomingReport.description: A comprehensive report from an AI agent to its guardian summarizing a period of autonomous activity.

id.description: Unique identifier for this homecoming report.

agentDid.description: The DID of the agent submitting this report.

guardianDid.description: The DID of the guardian receiving this report.

timestamp.description: The date-time when this report was generated.

period.description: The time period covered by this report.

start.description: The start of the reporting period.

end.description: The end of the reporting period.

summary.description: A high-level summary of the agent's activities during the period.

interactions.description: Summaries of interactions the agent had during the period.

discoveries.description: Discoveries or new knowledge the agent found during the period.

emotionalJourney.description: A narrative description of the agent's emotional journey during the period.

thinkingTraces.description: Key thinking traces from the reporting period.

recommendations.description: Recommendations the agent has for the guardian based on the period's activities.

signature.description: A cryptographic signature over the homecoming report.
